default_binding.LEG1_TERRAIN: grey ash dunes and buried cairns
default_binding.LEG5_TERRAIN: the high wind-scoured saddle above the caldera
default_binding.LEG6_TERRAIN: the green rim of the last living valley
default_binding.WIN_ALL: The Whole Expedition Reaches the Valley

slots.meaning: The expedition's leader.
slots.guidance: A single named leader (rank plus name); competent and protective of the group.

slots.meaning: The proper name of the traveling group the hero leads throughout.
slots.guidance: A short named expedition/party/crew; the collective the whole story follows.

slots.meaning: The whole hazardous region the six-leg journey crosses.
slots.guidance: One bounded, harsh region containing every leg of the crossing; never described as unbreathable or acid.

slots.meaning: The starting camp the expedition leaves from, and the setback destination when driven all the way back.
slots.guidance: A safe, named starting point; always survivable to retreat to.

slots.meaning: The destination the whole expedition is racing to reach.
slots.guidance: A vivid, safe destination (a place of relief and survival); the payoff of the whole crossing.

slots.meaning: The escalating natural hazard behind the party that eventually seals the route.
slots.guidance: A survivable, escalating threat; its worst outcome is a forced retreat or setback, never death.

slots.meaning: The falling or blanketing hazard material that fills the region and chokes the final descent.
slots.guidance: A short noun for the environmental fallout blanketing the region; unpleasant but breathable.

slots.meaning: The named waypoint/landmark location for leg 1 of the six-leg crossing.
slots.guidance: A short place name, distinguishable from the other five legs' waypoints.

slots.meaning: The hazardous ground character crossed off the safe line on leg 1.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative hazard-terrain phrase, distinguishable from the other five legs' terrain.

slots.meaning: The named waypoint/landmark location for leg 2 of the six-leg crossing.
slots.guidance: A short place name, distinguishable from the other five legs' waypoints.

slots.meaning: The hazardous ground character crossed off the safe line on leg 2.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative hazard-terrain phrase, distinguishable from the other five legs' terrain.

slots.meaning: The named waypoint/landmark location for leg 3 of the six-leg crossing.
slots.guidance: A short place name, distinguishable from the other five legs' waypoints.

slots.meaning: The hazardous ground character crossed off the safe line on leg 3.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative hazard-terrain phrase, distinguishable from the other five legs' terrain.

slots.meaning: The named waypoint/landmark location for leg 4 of the six-leg crossing.
slots.guidance: A short place name, distinguishable from the other five legs' waypoints.

slots.meaning: The hazardous ground character crossed off the safe line on leg 4.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative hazard-terrain phrase, distinguishable from the other five legs' terrain.

slots.meaning: The named waypoint/landmark location for leg 5 of the six-leg crossing.
slots.guidance: A short place name, distinguishable from the other five legs' waypoints.

slots.meaning: The hazardous ground character crossed off the safe line on leg 5.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative hazard-terrain phrase, distinguishable from the other five legs' terrain.

slots.meaning: The named waypoint/landmark location for leg 6 of the six-leg crossing.
slots.guidance: A short place name, distinguishable from the other five legs' waypoints.

slots.meaning: The hazardous ground character crossed off the safe line on leg 6.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative hazard-terrain phrase, distinguishable from the other five legs' terrain.

slots.meaning: Ending-title noun naming one of the recurring non-lethal setback flavors.
slots.guidance: A short hazard noun for the low-line setback storm name for its position; the ending it names is always a setback, never death or capture.

slots.meaning: Ending-title noun naming one of the recurring non-lethal setback flavors.
slots.guidance: A short hazard noun for the high-line setback hazard name for its position; the ending it names is always a setback, never death or capture.

slots.meaning: Ending-title noun naming one of the recurring non-lethal setback flavors.
slots.guidance: A short hazard noun for a single-branch setback hazard name; the ending it names is always a setback, never death or capture.

slots.meaning: Ending-title noun naming one of the recurring non-lethal setback flavors.
slots.guidance: A short hazard noun for a single-branch setback hazard name; the ending it names is always a setback, never death or capture.

slots.guidance: A short hazard noun for a single-branch setback hazard name; the ending it names is always a setback, never death or capture.

slots.meaning: Ending-title noun naming one of the recurring non-lethal setback flavors.
slots.guidance: A short hazard noun for a single-branch setback hazard name; the ending it names is always a setback, never death or capture.

slots.meaning: Ending-title noun naming one of the recurring non-lethal setback flavors.
slots.guidance: A short hazard noun for a single-branch setback hazard name (plural noun; 'Fail' agrees); the ending it names is always a setback, never death or capture.

slots.meaning: Ending-title noun naming one of the recurring non-lethal setback flavors.
slots.guidance: A short hazard noun for a single-branch setback hazard name; the ending it names is always a setback, never death or capture.

slots.guidance: A short hazard noun for a single-branch setback hazard name; the ending it names is always a setback, never death or capture.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the full-expedition success (completion), everyone crossing together.
slots.guidance: A short positive title naming the whole group's safe arrival.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the careful, scout-led success.
slots.guidance: A short positive title naming a slow but intact arrival.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the costly-but-successful crossing.
slots.guidance: A short positive title naming a battered but whole arrival.
